title: psilocaulon glareosum
side_effects: Psilocaulon glareosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In extreme cases, it can also lead to hallucinations, anxiety, and panic attacks, as well as an increased heart rate and blood pressure. Additionally, the plant's effects can be unpredictable and may interact negatively with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions. Long-term use of Psilocaulon glareosum has also been linked to potential cognitive impairment and memory loss.
